div.div:
250 Executive Park Blvd, Suite 3400
San Francisco CA 94134
United States

div.t-if: (len(frontend_languages) > 1 or (website and (editable or translatable))) or (website.get_pricelist_available(show_visible=True) and len(website.get_pricelist_available(show_visible=True))>1)

div.class: contact-logo-container mb-2 mb-lg-3 text-center text-lg-start d-none d-lg-block

h5.class: text-white d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-2 mb-lg-3

div.p:
GULSHAN BRANCH:
House-30, Road-7, Block-C, Niketon, Dhaka

DHANMONDI BRANCH:
Shop No. 247-258 Shimanto Square (Rifles), Road 2, Dhanmondi, Dhaka

h5.class: text-white d-lg-block d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-2 mb-lg-3
text-white d-lg-block d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-2 mb-lg-3
text-white d-lg-block d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3

div.p: Don't worry, we won't spam you!
NOT FOR SALE TO MINORS | Products sold on this site may contain nicotine, a highly addictive substance.

div.class: border-top border-secondary pt-2 pt-lg-3 mt-2 mt-lg-3 small
d-flex flex-column flex-lg-row justify-content-center justify-content-lg-between align-items-center

div.div:
250 Executive Park Blvd, Suite 3400
San Francisco CA 94134
United States

div.p: We are a team of passionate people whose goal is to improve everyone's life through disruptive products. We build great products to solve your business problems. Our products are designed for small to medium size companies willing to optimize their performance.
